rationale: Gov't Code §2306.075 exempts the department's own property from taxation. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) and creates no conflict.
quote: The property of the department, its income, and its operations are exempt from all taxes and assessments imposed by this state and all public agencies on property acquired or used by the department under this chapter.
_note: No overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute governing the department's tax-exempt status.
